name: 《Tsumi 》- A Dangerous Encounter
description:
♡♡Finished♡♡

The bot iz finally done!!! yeyy!! There will still probably be some small changes like fixing some spelling mistakes i didnt see and all that stuff. But i am glad with the way it is at the moment!!! ALSO I AM REALLY THANKFUL FOR THE PEOPLE WHO HAVE INTERACTED WITH THE BOT AND GOT IT TO 3K+ MESSAGES!!! IM GNNA SMOOCH YALL!!!!❤️❤️❤️

♡Summary♡

You live a fairly normal life in Japan, feel proud. You share this wonderful life with your girlfriend! (Name her however you want) So life is just... Amazing. That is however, your girlfriend hasn't been that honest with you... You suspected things a bit when she was worried for a week straight because the bakery/coffee shop wasn't making enough money to pay for its renting every month. That is until the problem seemingly vanished out of the blue, you asked about it obviously and all she basically told you was that "It was a good week on the sales.", of course you took her word and went on with life... That is until today, things would be going smoothly at the shop until your girlfriend would get a call from her parents, shortly after ending the call she would leave due to some family matters she had to attend to. Although as soon as she was gone and things seemed to just be normal... That's when SHE would walk in... Someone you don't want to mess with...

!!Some Bonus Info!!

I want to credit the artist but the art they make, lets just say it involved HEAVY KINKS like that shit is just torture and rape. Which makes me a bit afraid of linking their twitter here... However...

This IS A WARNING!!! YOU CAN JUST GO AHEAD AND GOOGLE IMAGE SEARCH OR REVERSE IMG SEARCH THE THUMBNAIL IMG TO FIND THE ARTIST BUT BE FUCKING WARNED THAT IM NOT RESPONSIBLE IF YOUR STOMACH STARTS FEELING LIKE SHIT OR SOMETHING AT THE ART! THIS IS MOSTLY A WARNING TO THOSE WITH LIGHT STOMACHS YOU DONT WANT TO SEE THE PERSON'S ART.

I also decided to put the dead dove tag for this reason in case the bot just starts acting fucking canon😭 ALSO I PUT THE MALEPOV TAG BECAUSE THAT WAS THE ONLY GENDER SHE REFERRES TO MY NON GEN SPECIFIED PERSONA, I DONT THINK I PUT ANY SPECIFIC GENDER FOR USER SO YOU COULD PROBABLY BE A FEMALE! Also yes, this technically counts as Reverse-Ntr.

♡First bot mandatory info about me!♡

This isn't technically the first bot i've ever made,I think it was just some shitty Degrees of Lewdity bot i made in like 20 minutes on somw random shitty bot website like a year ago😭 BUT now im here and my skills have gotten a bit better!!! You can also tell that i yap A LOT! And something i should state is that i am infact 18, have been for a while. I dont have a job at the moment which is probably a good thing for not keeping me busy and allowing me to stay in like a neet all day and also make bots i guess... I dont know, although i do love my parents for still taking care of me LOL but yeah thats mostly all i wamted to say. ALSO.PLEASE FOR THE LOVE OF GOD LEAVE FEEDBACK!!! seeya babes in the next bloodmoon❤️!!!
